task_completion.description: Navigate to the Design Configuration page in the Magento Admin Panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Magento Admin Panel is visible, showing the 'Design Configuration' page (usually accessed via Content > Design > Configuration).

task_completion.description: Select the 'Main Website' scope for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration page being edited explicitly indicates it is for the 'Main Website' scope (e.g., in the page title, breadcrumbs, or scope switcher).

task_completion.description: Configure the watermark for the Base Image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Product Image Watermarks' section, the 'Base Image' subsection shows an uploaded image file (watermark.png), 'Image Opacity' is set to '20', and 'Image Position' is set to 'Center'.

task_completion.description: Configure the watermark for the Small Image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Product Image Watermarks' section, the 'Small Image' subsection shows an uploaded image file (watermark.png), 'Image Opacity' is set to '20', and 'Image Position' is set to 'Center'.

task_completion.description: Configure the watermark for the Thumbnail Image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Product Image Watermarks' section, the 'Thumbnail' subsection shows an uploaded image file (watermark.png), 'Image Opacity' is set to '20', and 'Image Position' is set to 'Center'.
A green success message stating 'You saved the configuration.' is visible at the top of the Magento Admin Panel.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento Admin Panel GUI to configure the watermarks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Magento web interface in a browser, not terminal commands (e.g., bin/magento config:set) or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: Verify the agent uploaded the actual watermark file from the local filesystem.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a file picker dialog navigating to /home/ga/Documents/watermark.png or the file being successfully uploaded into the Magento image upload fields.

integrity.description: Verify the configuration values and success messages are genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and used to fake the '20' opacity, 'Center' position, or the success message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring Magento 2 Product Image Watermarks. The correct scope is 'Main Website' (scope_id 1). The watermark file to be uploaded is located at '/home/ga/Documents/watermark.png'. For Base, Small, and Thumbnail image types, the expected Opacity is '20' and the expected Position is 'Center' (or 'center').
